name: com.geomqtt.unity
description: Unity client for a geomqtt server. Subscribes to tiles covering an area of interest and exposes add/move/remove events for objects. Supports both flat 2D map overlays and 3D world-anchored scenes (lat/lng → local ENU meters).

samples.description: A MonoBehaviour that spawns a sphere per object at the correct world position, anchored to a configurable origin lat/lng.
